posts.author: alon_h (Alon Hayun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

In board A, i wrote all workers birthdays (column type is “DATE”).
-Each item in board A represents a different worker.
Using an automation, I would like to send an Email only if the birthday is on Sunday.
This Email should be sent on thursday in the previous week.
How can i do that?
Thanks!
Alon
